final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of a hyper-futuristic Shibuya Crossing in a cyberpunk Tokyo.

Style/medium: cinematic still, photorealistic with film grain texture, inspired by Blade Runner 2049 and Ghost in the Shell aesthetic
Composition: ultra-wide-angle fisheye lens perspective, extreme low-angle looking upward at skyscrapers, deep depth of field capturing foreground to background detail
Subject: dense crowd of pedestrians mixed with humanoid androids, some wearing AR glasses and luminescent futuristic clothing, walking across the iconic intersection
Scene/backdrop: hyper-futuristic Shibuya Crossing at night, towering skyscrapers with wall-to-wall holographic advertising screens covering every facade
Lighting/mood: harsh neon glow from thousands of screens, blue-violet and orange-red light pollution washing over the street, oppressive and tense atmosphere
Color palette: cool blue-violet as dominant base, warm orange-red neon as accent highlights, wet asphalt reflecting both color families
Materials/textures: wet reflective pavement mirroring all overhead lights, holographic screen surfaces with slight pixelation, luminescent fabric textures on clothing
Text (verbatim): "日文、英文、中文"
Constraints: maintain fisheye distortion throughout frame; all three scripts (Japanese, English, Chinese) must appear on signage
Avoid: 8K stuffer language, plastic-looking crowds, deformed anatomy, oversaturated candy colors, clean daylight, cheerful mood
